title: Summary: Turn 21
content: The `src/agent` directory contains 21 files including core agent modules: types (`pepe-types.ts`), services (`pepe-result-service.ts`, `pepe-semantic-client.ts`, `pepe-local-embedding-client.ts`), memory mirror (`pepe-memory-mirror.ts`), supervisor (`pepe-supervisor.ts`), worker (`pepe-worker.ts`, `pepe-worker-process.ts`, `pepe-worker-protocol.ts`), task runner (`task-runner.ts`), repository (`task-repository.ts`, `agent-instance-repository.ts`), and profile/template loaders (`pueblo-profile.ts`, `agent-profile-templates.ts`, `agent-template-loader.ts`). This inventory provides a high-level view of the agent architecture for future retrieval.
